prose.title: 68t mos duty stations
prose.body:
The 68T MOS, also known as Animal Care Specialist, has various duty stations available throughout the United States and overseas. Some potential duty stations for 68T MOS personnel include:

1. Fort Sam Houston, Texas
2. Fort Hood, Texas
3. Fort Carson, Colorado
4. Fort Bragg, North Carolina
5. Joint Base Lewis-McChord, Washington
6. Fort Benning, Georgia
7. Fort Campbell, Kentucky
8. Fort Drum, New York
9. Fort Stewart, Georgia
10. Fort Riley, Kansas

In addition to these bases, there may also be opportunities for 68T MOS personnel to be stationed at overseas locations like Germany, Italy, South Korea, and Japan. It's worth noting that duty stations can change depending on the needs of the military, so these are just examples of potential locations.
